mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT * FROM users WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND id IN
#{userId}
SELECT * FROM users WHERE mobile = #{mobile} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1
SELECT is_seller FROM users WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET password = #{password}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET mobile = #{mobile}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET email = #{email}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, nickname, password, mobile, email, avatar, bio, credit_score, credit_level, credit_updated_at, status, is_seller, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{nickname}, #{password}, #{mobile}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{bio}, #{creditScore}, #{creditLevel}, #{creditUpdatedAt}, #{status}, IFNULL(#{isSeller}, 0), NOW(), NOW())
